title: stelis laudabilis
intro: Stelis laudabilis, also known as the "Gentle Orchid," is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stelis laudabilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Stelis laudabilis is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or poultice, and can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
